task_snapshots.title: 333d-04: Wire prioritize_starving_roles into task distribution
task_snapshots.description:
Integrate prioritize_starving_roles into task fetching so tasks for empty-agent roles are fetched first.

- group_by_role() should return {role: [tasks]} in order of starvation
- Starving roles (0 agents, >0 tasks) come first
- Reduce task server load: always fetch highest-priority (most-starved) role's tasks

[subtask of 15d83a329576]

**Completion signal**: group_by_role returns tasks ordered by starvation level; test confirms qa tasks come before backend when qa has 0 agents.
